title: BRITA Marella Water Filter Jug Blue (2.4L) Starter Pack incl. 3x MAXTRA PRO Pure Performance cartridge - fridge-fitting jug with digital LTI and Flip-Lid - now in sustainable Smart Box packaging
features: All-Rounder with the innovative BRITA filtration technology: 150 litres of filtered water with just one cartridge, fitting in standard fridge doors.
Features a spout cover, one-hand filling with the flip-lid, BRITA Memo measures time to remind on filter exchange. BPA-free and dishwasher-safe (except digital indicator)
MAXTRA PRO 4-stage filtration with natural activated carbon and ion-exchanger pearls: pure and fresh water, full aroma in your coffee and tea and reliable limescale protection.
Filters impurities such as certain herbicides, pesticides and pharmaceuticals, reduces taste-impairing substances such as chlorine, limescale and metals like lead and copper .
Improved filter performance: BRITA's new innovative micro-mesh reduces microparticles ≥ 30 μm. 4x better than our previous BRITA MAXTRA+ filter cartridge
Full capacity of 2.4L for 1.4L fresh filtered water (Cool version only). Need for even more fresh filtered water? Check out BRITA Marella XL, BRITA Style XL and BRITA Flow.
Included: 1x BRITA Marella water filter jug in Blue, 3x MAXTRA PRO Pure Performance filter cartridges.
